title: Manufacturing Engineer - Dabur India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Dabur India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Dabur India has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dabur India:
Dabur India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dabur India!
